mapper.select: select id, session_id, thread_id, message_role, message_type, content, create_time from agent_message where thread_id = #{threadId} and deleted = 0 order by create_time asc, id asc

select id, session_id, thread_id, message_role, message_type, content, create_time from ( select id, session_id, thread_id, message_role, message_type, content, create_time from agent_message where thread_id = #{threadId} and deleted = 0 and message_role in ('USER', 'ASSISTANT') and content is not null and content != '' order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{limit} ) recent_message order by create_time asc, id asc
